Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 3 25 25}Why am I only ever right about the worst things...?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Am I stupid for trusting in something so blindly?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}I got this letter from you last spring.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}I must've read it a thousand times since then.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}"To my family, ten years into the future."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}"Tomorrow, I'll bring this letter to the opening ceremony for the Moonlight Bridge."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}"It will be stored in a time capsule, and sent to you in ten years' time."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}"Yukari... You may be small now, but in ten years, you'll be sixteen. You'll be in high school."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}"I know you've been sad because I have to work so late, but you always manage to greet me with a smile."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}"I'm really proud of myself. Kirijo-san appointed me Head Researcher."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}"I'll be starting on a big project soon. It feels good to receive so much recognition for my work."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}"But I swear to you, nothing is more important to me than you and your mother."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}"Yukari... I wonder. Are you enjoying life? Do you have high hopes for the future?"[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}"Do you still look towards tomorrow with excitement and wonder, like you do now?"[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}"No matter what happens in the next ten years, I hope you're happy."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}"And I hope this letter brings a smile to both you and your mother's faces."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}"Eiichiro Takeba. March 6th, 2000."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}No matter what happens, huh?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}I won't turn my back. I won't be like Mom.[n]{f 1 1}
